UI Designer building

I design warm, considered digital experiences — from fitness dashboards to dating apps and wellness tools. Currently exploring the intersection of design and frontend development.

Dark & Light Mode

Selected Work

Volt
Fitness App · UI Design
2026

A daily-precision fitness tracker for people who want their training data at a glance. Nutrition, workouts, and progress live in one cream-and-lime system built for fast scanning between sets.

Problem

Fitness data is usually scattered across three separate apps. Volt needed to unify nutrition, training, and progress without feeling cluttered mid-workout.

Approach

Cream base with a single acid-lime accent, bold numerals for at-a-glance reading, and consistent card patterns across every data type.

Outcome

4-screen system covering daily overview, macro tracking, live workout logging, and long-term progress with PRs and consistency history.

Tether
Dating App · UI Design
2026

A dating app built around intention rather than swiping fatigue. Warm terracotta identity, a clean sign-in flow, a match moment designed to feel like a genuine connection, and a chat that carries that same warmth forward.

Problem

Dating apps optimise for endless swiping. Tether needed to feel intentional and warm from the very first screen, not transactional.

Approach

Warm terracotta palette, serif typography, a real photo-first profile flow, and a match screen with playful, human copy instead of a generic alert.

Outcome

End-to-end flow from splash through profile setup, swiping, and match celebration, with a consistent nav bar and component system throughout.

Zenith
Wellness App · UI Design · 2026

A hyper-personalised mental health app using a soft lavender system to feel calm rather than clinical. Daily check-ins, guided breathing, and AI-driven insights replace the usual form-heavy mood tracker.

Problem

Mental health apps feel clinical and form-like. Zenith needed to feel like a conversation with someone who understands you.

Approach

Soft lavender palette, a guided breathing ritual as the centrepiece interaction, and color-coded mood patterns surfaced as plain-language insights.

Outcome

4-screen system covering daily check-in, a guided exercise, an insights dashboard with monthly patterns, and profile management.

About me

I'm a self-taught UI designer with a focus on mobile app design. I care about the details — the right font weight, the right shadow, the right amount of breathing room.

I'm currently learning frontend development so I can build what I design. I believe the best designers understand how things are built.

Design

Figma, Design Systems, Prototyping, Variables, Components

Frontend

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Responsive Design

Process

User flows, Wireframing, Visual Design, Handoff

Currently learning

React, Framer Motion, CSS animations

Let's work together

Open to junior UI design roles, product design internships, and freelance projects.

transition: color 0.3s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #F5F3F0; } /* Hero */ .hero { padding: 100px 40px 80px; max-width: 900px; animation: fadeUp 1s ease forwards; } .hero h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 52px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 24px; } .hero p { font-size: 17px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.6); max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 32px; } .tags { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .tag { font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.2); border-radius: 20px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.7); } /* Projects */ .projects { padding: 60px 40px; } .section-label { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.4); margin-bottom: 40px; text-transform: uppercase; } .project-card { border: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.1); border-radius: 24px; padding: 48px; margin-bottom: 24px; transition: border-color 0.3s; cursor: pointer; } .project-card:hover { border-color: rgba(245,243,240,0.3); } .project-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 16px; } .project-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 500; } .project-meta { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.4); text-align: right; line-height: 1.6; } .project-desc { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.6); max-width: 600px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 32px; } /* Screen previews */ .screens { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 36px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 4px; } .screen { min-width: 160px; height: 320px; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; background: rgba(245,243,240,0.04); } .screen img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top center; display: block; } /* Case study grid */ .case-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; padding-top: 32px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.1); } .case-item h4 { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px; } .case-item p { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.55); line-height: 1.65; } .volt-accent { color: #D6FF4F; } .tether-accent { color: #E8735A; } .zenith-accent { color: #7C6FA0; } /* About */ .about { padding: 80px 40px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.1); display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; } .about h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 20px; } .about p { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.6); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 16px; } .skills { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .skill { background: rgba(245,243,240,0.05); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; } .skill h5 { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.4); margin-bottom: 8px; } .skill p { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.7); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; } /* Contact */ .contact { padding: 80px 40px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.1); } .contact h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 42px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 16px; } .contact p { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(245,243,240,0.6); margin-bottom: 32px; } .contact-links { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; } .btn { padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s; } .btn-primary { background: #F5F3F0; color: #0F0F12; } .btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(245,243,240,0.85); } .btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #F5F3F0; border: 1px solid rgba(245,243,240,0.3); } .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(245,243,240,0.7); } /* Animation */ @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
